Pok\u00E9mon are required to think by "]},{"c":401,"i":2,"p":["themselves."]},{"c":101,"i":2,"p":["Unlike in the wild, Pok\u00E9mon that live with people "]},{"c":401,"i":2,"p":["behave differently depending on their nature."]},{"c":119,"i":2,"p":["Choices"]},{"c":0,"i":2,"p":[]},{"c":402,"i":1,"p":[1,"Pok\u00E9mon nature"]},{"c":101,"i":2,"p":["Depending on its nature, a Pok\u00E9mon may prefer to "]},{"c":401,"i":2,"p":["attack no matter what."]},{"c":101,"i":2,"p":["Another Pok\u00E9mon may prefer to protect itself from "]},{"c":401,"i":2,"p":["harm."]},{"c":101,"i":2,"p":["Yet another may enjoy vexing or confounding its "]},{"c":401,"i":2,"p":["foes."]},{"c":101,"i":2,"p":["A Pok\u00E9mon\u0027s nature determines which moves it is "]},{"c":401,"i":2,"p":["good at using, and which moves it has trouble using."]},{"c":119,"i":2,"p":["Choices"]},{"c":0,"i":2,"p":[]},{"c":402,"i":1,"p":[2,"Pok\u00E9mon moves"]},{"c":101,"i":2,"p":["There are offensive moves that deal direct damage "]},{"c":401,"i":2,"p":["on the foe."]},{"c":101,"i":2,"p":["There are defensive moves that are used to prepare "]},{"c":401,"i":2,"p":["for enemy attacks or used to heal HP and so on."]},{"c":101,"i":2,"p":["And there are other somewhat-odd moves that may "]},{"c":401,"i":2,"p":["enfeeble the foe with status problems including "]},{"c":401,"i":2,"p":["poison and "]},{"c":401,"i":2,"p":["dislikes."]},{"c":101,"i":2,"p":["If a Pok\u00E9mon only knows moves that don\u0027t conform "]},{"c":401,"i":2,"p":["to its nature, it will often be unable to live up to its
